description: fillna ffill→bfill changes direction of forward/backward fill

_meta.explanation: bfill (backward fill) uses the next valid observation to fill gaps. The NaN at index 1 and 2 are filled with 4.0 (the next valid value).
_meta.curriculum_note: Level 1. Directional fill — forward vs backward.
